steps.title: Choose the relevant quotation
steps.content: The student needs a quotation supporting a claim about Tharpe's contribution to rock 'n' roll. Dana Moreno's quotation directly names Tharpe as the founding mother of the genre, so it speaks to her role in rock history.

steps.title: Keep the quote on claim
steps.content: Choice A gives no quotation. Choice B only paraphrases Moreno instead of using quoted language. Choice D quotes Marla Brooks about Tharpe's performance power, not her contribution to rock 'n' roll. The answer is C.
